Figure 6: Experiment 1 (Diffusion) - Error statistics with respect to five random seeds for weight initialization, varying the training set size. In blue, the µBC-GINN performance, in orange the µBC-FCNN performance. The continuous lines represent the average errors (same as Table 1), the dotted lines represent the medians.

Figure 2: Schematic representation of a mesh discretization on a square domainΩ with a portion of the boundary under the action of the parameters µb and µv. This portion is Γµb , the continuous, grey, and thick line. The nodes that may change features are denoted with square and circle dots, while the nodes of the boundary with fixed features are denoted with black crosses. the color of the square and circle dotes denote the value of the BCs described by µv.
